prompt: Create a romantic vertical anime fantasy illustration shown as a smartphone screenshot preview with black UI bars at the top and bottom. The phone status bar at the top shows the time “23:06” on the left, signal bars, “4G”, and a battery icon on the right, plus a small white X close button near the upper left of the image area; the bottom black bar shows a white thumbs-up icon, a thin divider line, and a white thumbs-down icon. Inside the screenshot, depict an intimate birthday and wedding-anniversary celebration scene at night: a tall, broad-shouldered beastman husband with lion-like cat ears, long blond mane, and large clawed hands embraces a petite young wife with long wavy platinum-blonde hair, fair skin, delicate purple flower hair ornaments, and violet jewelry. Their faces are intentionally covered by two plain opaque censor rectangles in muted brown tones, one larger square over the man’s face and one smaller vertical rectangle over the woman’s face, while the rest of their bodies remain visible. The man wears an ornate black-and-gold embroidered formal jacket over a cream vest and cravat, with a dark choker-like collar and decorative chains; his arm wraps protectively around her waist. The woman wears a flowing lavender off-shoulder fantasy gown with sheer sleeves, floral lace, sparkling embroidery, and a soft glowing skirt; her hand rests gently on his chest. Set them on an elegant sofa in a candlelit room filled with warm golden bokeh, a dark window showing a deep blue night outside, flowers, lanterns, and wrapped gifts. In the foreground include exactly 5 prominent celebration elements: 1 round white cake decorated with pink and purple roses and candles, 3 lit candles on or near the cake, 1 gold crown-like cake topper, 2 wrapped gift boxes with lavender bows on the lower right, and scattered pink-purple blossoms. Use a luxurious shoujo fantasy anime style, highly detailed hair strands, soft rim light, glowing candles, romantic purple and gold color palette, shallow depth of field, sparkles, painterly rendering, and an intimate affectionate pose. No readable text inside the illustration except the smartphone UI indicators.
